name: Anzio Girls High School
description:
I think it was time to do this, it was inevitable, technically it's like saying "all roads lead to Rome" and what better example than making a bot of these three girls with Italian character.

But of course, I need to make some changes before I finish. But of course, I need to make some changes before they end up criticizing and labeling me as someone who likes underage girls. That's why Carpaccio and Pepperoni are in third grade here, while Anchovy is in college...and let's leave the Trattoria topic aside. I know I made that part up...but let's be honest, they would have definitely built a Trattoria there at the academy.
creator: Viktor Mctavis
